name: Rand Paul
subject: How we stop King Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Patriot-
President Obama and the Democrats have had
their hearts set on taking your guns since Obama was sworn in.
They'll use every excuse they can - every
tragedy, terrorist attack, or accident -- to push their anti-2nd
Amendment agenda and take away your civil liberties.
And they keep failing.
And Obama's plans for executive orders on
guns?
They'll fail too.
Because I'm not going to let him ignore the
Constitution and act as if the executive branch is the only
branch of our government.
I've introduced legislation that would decree
any executive action on gun control that either infringes upon
congressional authority or potentially violates the Second
Amendment as "advisory only" until legislation that supported the
action is passed by Congress.
That means if the president wants new gun
laws, he's gonna have to go through me.

STAND WITH ME

You see, President Obama seems to forget: he
is not the only authority.
In the United States, we do not have a king,
we have a Constitution. We also have the Second Amendment, and I
will fight tooth and nail to protect it.
Protecting the Second Amendment is vital to
conserving our republic.
President Obama's plan to disarm more law
abiding citizens is outrageous. It will not stop mass murderers
or terrorists. It will not protect America. It will make us all
less safe.
We should be advocating for more concealed
carry ability for law abiding Americans and an end to
unconstitutional gun free zones - not taking away their rights to
protect themselves.
If you agree, will you stand with me today by
donating $50, $75, or $100 today?

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Pitch in $25 TODAY >>

Pitch in $50 TODAY >>

Pitch in $75 TODAY >>

Pitch in $100 TODAY>>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Heidi
subject: Today is Ted's Birthday!
body:
CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

Friend, I need your help to surprise Ted. He's turning 45 TODAY!
With your help, I want to surprise him with a special birthday
card signed by you!

Friend,

I need your help to surprise Ted.

He's turning 45 TODAY!

With your help, I want to surprise him with a special birthday
card signed by you!
Click here to sign your own personalized birthday card for Ted.

As you know, Ted has been hard at work on the campaign trail --
traveling all across the country, making hundreds of phone calls
each day, and listening to voters.

Ted's sacrificing a great deal and putting tremendous effort into
running a winning campaign.

But, to win, he needs to hear from you -- I know a personal
birthday message from you would absolutely make his day.

Your words of support are a constant source of encouragement and
energy for Ted.

I want to surprise Ted and see how many people we can get to sign
his birthday card.

Click here and help me wish my husband, Ted, a happy birthday,
and in honor of his 45th birthday -- chip in $45 to help him
become the 45th President of the United States.
I know it'll mean the world to him.

Thanks for all that you do,

Heidi Cruz

PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR
PRESIDENTwww.tedcruz.org

Copyright © 2015 All Rights Reserved | Privacy Policy

name: Jordyn Rush
subject: FWD: They're out in full force
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Friend, Did you see Senator Patty Murray's email from yesterday? She's exactly right that Republicans are going to continue their attacks on women's health and middle class families in the next Congress, and it's up to us to stop them. Senator Murray needs allies in the Senate to serve as the first line of defense against these attacks, and that's why it's so critical that we send Katie to Washington to stand with her. **[Will you step up and contribute to Katie's campaign before midnight tonight? You can make a difference by chipping in $5 here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-164827680745717760/1073284976918659072?refcode=e20151222&refcode2=e20151222nd&amount=5)** Thanks, Jordyn Rush
Deputy Campaign Manager \----- Forwarded Message ------
From: Senator Patty Murray
---
Friend -- I can't do it alone. Right wing Republicans are out in full force, doing absolutely everything they can to turn back the clock on women's health care, take away access to health care for families, and block progress on so many of the middle class priorities that I and other Democrats are fighting for. We've been able to stop the worst of these attacks so far, but this year's election will be absolutely _critical_ in determining if we can keep this up in 2017. The progress we've made for women and middle class families and everything we want to do to build on that progress is under threat. I am doing my best to fight back, but I can't do it alone. **That 's why I'm supporting Katie McGinty for U.S. Senate. I need Katie to join me in Washington so that together, we can fight back against these Republican attacks and make progress for middle class families.** [**Katie needs another 42 donors to step up before****December 22**** to stay on track with her campaign. Can you chip in to help?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-164827680745717760/1073284976918659072?refcode=e20151222&refcode2=e20151222nd&amount=5) I was the first female senator ever elected from Washington state, and I certainly understand the challenges women face in politics today. But as first female Chair of the Senate Veterans Affairs Committee, and the first female Chair of the Senate Budget Committee--I know the difference women can make when we get involved and fight to make a difference. **That 's exactly what Katie McGinty is doing now. Katie is running to become the first female senator from Pennsylvania, and I'm supporting her because I need her help in Washington.** The race in Pennsylvania could absolutely be _ the _race that determines control of the U.S. Senate. Losing this race hurts our chances to continue protecting women's health care, confirming pro-choice judges to the Supreme Court, and taking on important issues like paid sick leave and equal pay. **That 's why I need Katie and why Katie needs you. ** [**Click here to contribute to Katie 's campaign, so that we can send a champion for women to Washington and put the Senate back in Democratic hands, where women's health care and rights will _always_ be protected.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-164827680745717760/1073284976918659072?refcode=e20151222&refcode2=e20151222nd&amount=5) Thank you,
Patty Murray
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-164827680745717760/1073284976918659072?refcode=e20151222&refcode2=e20151222nd&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-164827680745717760/1001227382880731136).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

subject: Making my list...

body:

name: Rand Paul
subject: Blessed are the peacemakers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Patriot-
Christmas is upon us this week, and for
Christians, we not only celebrate with family, trees, and gifts.
The birth of our Savior is the true reason we
celebrate, and during this season, my family and I reflect on
Christ's teachings and their impact on our lives and and our
world.
Christ was declared "the Prince of Peace."
Christ himself extolled the virtue of working
for peace in the Beatitudes as he declared, "Blessed are the
Peacemakers." Nowhere does he declare himself the Prince of War,
or praise the virtues of those eager for war.
I bring this up because I believe too many of
our leaders are too eager for war-too eager to sacrifice the
lives of our sons and daughters on the altar of their nation
building worldview, one that has proved to be so wrong and so
destructive.
We should be standing for life - for peace -
not for war.

STAND WITH ME

Ronald Reagan is regarded as a great
conservative leader on foreign policy, and often rightly so.
Reagan believed, as I do, in Peace through
Strength. What too many Republicans have forgotten today is that
peace was Reagan's goal and it should be ours.
He responded to terror attacks by punishing
the perpetrators, and even re-assessing a forward deployment of
U.S. troops.
He didn't start nation building and policing
the world. He didn't seek to repeal chunks of the Bill of Rights.
He didn't get us involved in every civil war,
and he didn't bellicosely threaten to start World War III by
shooting down Russian planes over Syria.
The rush to war, the bluster, and the
posturing of my fellow candidates for President alarms me, and it
should alarm every voter.
Any leader who shows glee or eagerness for
war should be disqualified from holding the office of
Commander-in-Chief.
Those from both sides of the aisle favor
enforcing a no-fly zone over Syria by shooting down Russian
jets. They so desperately want to take sides in a civil war and
topple another secular dictator in the Middle East, that they are
willing to publicly and foolishly risk engaging in WWIII to do
it.
Foolish bravado and campaign posturing should
not be confused for strength.
Loudmouth bullying should never be confused
for leadership.
I urge them to pause, to reflect, and to
read.
Let's study our recent history, which shows
how our policies in the Middle East led to the rise of ISIS, cost
us trillions of dollars and thousands of lives, and have left us
less safe.
But let's also study further back in
history-back to the time we are celebrating this week. We can be
strong and secure, while seeking Peace. And Peace is what we are
commanded to seek as we celebrate the birth of the Prince of
Peace.
Stand with me.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Pitch in $25 TODAY >>

Pitch in $50 TODAY >>

Pitch in $75 TODAY >>

Pitch in $100 TODAY>>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

----Powered by Paramount Communication----
http://www.paramountcommunication.com
clean_body: Patriot- Christmas is upon us this week, and for Christians, we not only celebrate with family, trees, and gifts. The birth of our Savior is the true reason we celebrate, and during this season, my family and I reflect on Christ's teachings and their impact on our lives and and our world. Christ was declared "the Prince of Peace." Christ himself extolled the virtue of working for peace in the Beatitudes as he declared, "Blessed are the Peacemakers." Nowhere does he declare himself the Prince of War, or praise the virtues of those eager for war. I bring this up because I believe too many of our leaders are too eager for war-too eager to sacrifice the lives of our sons and daughters on the altar of their nation building worldview, one that has proved to be so wrong and so destructive. We should be standing for life - for peace - not for war. STAND WITH ME Ronald Reagan is regarded as a great conservative leader on foreign policy, and often rightly so. Reagan believed, as I do, in Peace through Strength. What too many Republicans have forgotten today is that peace was Reagan's goal and it should be ours. He responded to terror attacks by punishing the perpetrators, and even re-assessing a forward deployment of U.S. troops. He didn't start nation building and policing the world. He didn't seek to repeal chunks of the Bill of Rights. He didn't get us involved in every civil war, and he didn't bellicosely threaten to start World War III by shooting down Russian planes over Syria. The rush to war, the bluster, and the posturing of my fellow candidates for President alarms me, and it should alarm every voter. Any leader who shows glee or eagerness for war should be disqualified from holding the office of Commander-in-Chief. Those from both sides of the aisle favor enforcing a no-fly zone over Syria by shooting down Russian jets. They so desperately want to take sides in a civil war and topple another secular dictator in the Middle East, that they are willing to publicly and foolishly risk engaging in WWIII to do it. Foolish bravado and campaign posturing should not be confused for strength. Loudmouth bullying should never be confused for leadership. I urge them to pause, to reflect, and to read. Let's study our recent history, which shows how our policies in the Middle East led to the rise of ISIS, cost us trillions of dollars and thousands of lives, and have left us less safe. But let's also study further back in history-back to the time we are celebrating this week. We can be strong and secure, while seeking Peace. And Peace is what we are commanded to seek as we celebrate the birth of the Prince of Peace. Stand with me. In Liberty, Rand Paul Pitch in $25 TODAY >> Pitch in $50 TODAY >> Pitch in $75 TODAY >> Pitch in $100 TODAY>> Or donate another amount >> Paid for by Rand Paul for President This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 16, 2015. name: Robby Mook, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Two things you should know about Bernie Sanders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
This race is close | Friend --

Bernie Sanders' campaign is on track to outraise us this month.

They say they’ve brought in more individual contributions than any candidate has ever had at this point in a primary. That means two things: (1) more of his supporters are chipping in to fund his campaign, even though we know we have more support; and (2) when we go into our first contests in Iowa and New Hampshire, we might not have the resources we'll need to really compete.

**[We’ve got to raise $2 million before the year ends. Help us close the gap by chipping in $1 before our final FEC deadline of 2015.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQzMDgwODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMzA4NzUzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

The fact is, many of our supporters don't think this campaign needs any help. If you're one of those people, I hate to say it, but you're wrong. We're completely reliant on you and your support.

Every dollar you give helps get us one step closer to reaching the voters we need to win in those key early states.

I can promise you this: We won’t waste a cent. But you have to step up right now to close the fundraising gap and get Hillary to her first victories.

**Donate $1 before the deadline:**
[ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQzMDgwODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMzA4NzUzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQzMDgwODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMzA4NzUzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQzMDgwODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMzA4NzUzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQzMDgwODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMzA4NzUzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQzMDgwODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMzA4NzUzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQzMDgwODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMzA4NzUzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQzMDgwODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMzA4NzUzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQzMDgwODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMzA4NzUzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQzMDgwODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMzA4NzUzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjQzMDgwODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMzA4NzUzS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjQzMDgwODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMzA4NzUzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQzMDgwODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMzA4NzUzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Cody
subject: sorry, Peter
body:
Hey Peter, Sorry to bug you three days before Christmas
| To view this email as a web page, go [ here.](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=45bb99a6f7fdaad9d77ad0f5465af26ecb68bde598884803356bbb37c83fd981ca0888a66d670624)

---
| |
---
| | | | |
---
| | Hey Peter,Sorry to bug you three days before Christmas, but I just wanted to make sure you saw Tyler's note below about our big opportunity to stand up to Governor McAuliffe at our 2016 Virginia Lobby Day. I realize January 18th is still a ways off, but I don't want you to forget.

This week we celebrate, next week it's back to fighting for freedom!Best,Cody Sent from my iPhone

---
| | [](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=45bb99a6f7fdaad97d83c32d08377aeef307abc99f55abad0613aaaacd32671dfc600821d88bb65a)
---
| | Peter,

I need a team of our top grassroots leaders to commit to a crucial mission. In just over two weeks the General Assembly will begin it's 2016 legislative session, and it's up to us to make sure they focus on passing good reforms, not Governor McAuliffe's big-government agenda. Our 2016 Virginia Lobby Day is your opportunity to tell your lawmakers to say no to Medicaid expansion and other big government schemes. Will you help me? I'll provide transportation and food, we just need your voice!**[Americans for Prosperity 2016 Virginia Lobby Day](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=45bb99a6f7fdaad94d0b1e00480ca96db724a1fb2d1d3303b939bc3a9a7aeeea22a180b9d06e7b65 "Americans for Prosperity 2016 Virginia Lobby Day")** Virginia State Capitol
**Monday, January 18th ** _Breakfast, lunch, dinner, training, and bus transportation provided!
_******All expenses are covered, but please[RSVP asap!](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=45bb99a6f7fdaad99301536449f22475d5a3c761194e91e39c2f3c559ee4f307cbc4433634cc3a4d "RSVP asap!")**We need as many people as possible to commit before Christmas. I've been told we need at least 200 citizen advocates in order to send a message that taxpayers are paying attention and counter Governor McAuliffe's agenda. Will you join us?Don't worry if you are inexperienced - we will train you how to be an effective grassroots advocate with your lawmakers. We will also set up the meetings so all you have to do is show up and talk about your support for lower taxes.Will you join the team?Sincerely,Tyler Foote
VA State Director
Americans for Prosperity
---
| |

This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com **
We respect your right to privacy - [**view our policy**](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=45bb99a6f7fdaad9b625f67a22bf0e14761fa8a93ae99f31f44367b8a4a6a66e00dd7705a9ff3bcd) Americans For Prosperity 1310 N. Courthouse Rd., Ste. 700 Arlington, Virginia 22201******[Update Profile and Subscription Preferences](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=45bb99a6f7fdaad9489d4be91175791a986aeedd89bfeb7846e8448b1f858177cb4f551831089492) | [One-Click Unsubscribe](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=45bb99a6f7fdaad90a6f06a79b030623890ea2a015ddc7ed9ffc71187782e095429c5ae7189645a3)******
---

name: Rick Santorum
subject: Friend, why Christmas?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| Friend,

Many people have been wishing me Happy Holidays this season, but I choose to say ‘Merry Christmas.’

May I explain why?

If it were up to the cultural & media elites, they would like us to forget that there is any true meaning in Christmas. But for me, Christmas is a special time to spread the joy of Christ’s birth. It’s not just a holiday for my family. It was a new beginning for us all. So, in the midst of the shopping, preparations, campaigning and family gatherings, I want to remember the real reason we are celebrating – in spite of the cultural push to forget it. [**Friend, will you donate $25 to send a strong message in the midst of a liberal elite mindset that wants us to deny that this holiday is about the birth of Jesus?**](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fmerry_christmas&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_ask&n=1)
**Will you support me in choosing to say ‘Merry Christmas’?

[](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fmerry_christmas&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_ask&n=2)** Blessings, Rick

---
Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, so if you have any thoughts on anything at all, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/contact?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_ask&n=3) and let us know. We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch with our supporters, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_ask&n=4) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ffacebook.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_ask&n=5), [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_ask&n=6), or [Instagram](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Finstagram.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_ask&n=7).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help us reclaim the American Dream for hardworking families.**

Santorum for President 2016, PO Box 238, Verona, PA 15147

[Privacy Policy](http://www.ricksantorum.com/privacy?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_ask&n=8)

name: Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.
subject: Phyllis Schlafly's Support to Make America Great Again
body:
Trump - Make America Great Again!
| |
---
| | [](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=phyllis2&n=1)
---
| |
---
[www.DonaldJTrump.com](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=phyllis2&n=2)
| |
---
****Phyllis Schlafly's Support to Make America Great Again****
| Dear Peter, I wanted to share the article below written by highly respected conservative, Phyllis Schlafly. Phyllis' support is a testament to my message to Make America Great Again and your enthusiasm to ensure our country is better than it has ever been before. Phyllis stated that I am "the only one who will fight" and it's true. I will fight harder than anyone. This country has been so great to me and I want to do something really special in return. We are going to rebuild the American Dream and make it bigger and better and stronger than ever before for each and every one of you. It has been an incredible 7 months and I look forward to celebrating the many blessings in my life, including all of you, with my family over the next week. More great news and exciting moments ahead in the new year. Enjoy! [http://www.wnd.com/2015/12/top-conservative-trump-is-last-hope-for-america/](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.wnd.com%2F2015%2F12%2Ftop-conservative-trump-is-last-hope-for-america%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=phyllis2&n=3)
---

clean_body: Trump - Make America Great Again! | | | | | | | | **Phyllis Schlafly's Support to Make America Great Again** | Dear Peter, I wanted to share the article below written by highly respected conservative, Phyllis Schlafly. Phyllis' support is a testament to my message to Make America Great Again and your enthusiasm to ensure our country is better than it has ever been before. Phyllis stated that I am "the only one who will fight" and it's true. I will fight harder than anyone. This country has been so great to me and I want to do something really special in return. We are going to rebuild the American Dream and make it bigger and better and stronger than ever before for each and every one of you. It has been an incredible 7 months and I look forward to celebrating the many blessings in my life, including all of you, with my family over the next week. More great news and exciting moments ahead in the new year. Enjoy! | Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. mailto:info@donaldtrump.com | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | Visit our page to remove yourself from further emails. 725 5th Avenue New York, NY 10022

name: Team Murphy
subject: Rush Limbaugh: Climate Change Hypocrite
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

Rush Limbaugh publicly denied climate change, calling it a "hoax" on his radio show. He dismissed the scientific fact that continued greenhouse gas emissions will put several U.S. cities below sea level as "utterly preposterous."

_But when it comes to his beachfront mansion, it appears Rush has a very different take on climate change._ **He just signed off on a plan to cooperate with the government to protect his Palm Beach property from climate change-induced storm erosion.**

[**Call on Rush to stop being a hypocrite and admit that climate change is a problem that needs to be addressed.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21be/738133e4/3b9822bd/7f8362d5/2161447343/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151223d")

Rush's public denial of climate change is dangerous, especially in Florida, where a recent report listed four of our cities among the eight most at risk for storm surges.

In South Florida, the situation is growing especially dire. The high-water mark in Miami is climbing at the rate of an inch a year -- which is nearly ten times that of average global sea-level increases. **When President Obama spoke about climate change he said, "Nowhere is it going to have a bigger impact than here in South Florida."**

The harmful effects of climate change have already begun here in Florida. Rush Limbaugh seems to acknowledge that -- he's protecting his own property from the effects.

[**Add your name to our petition to tell Rush to stop being a hypocrite. Climate change is happening and you don 't have to look any further than Florida to see it.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21be/738133e4/3b9822bd/7f8362d5/2161447343/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151223d")

Thank you,

Team Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21be/738133e4/3b9822bd/7f8362d0/2161447343/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
